meaning: 1. to fold; 2. collapsible; 3. folding (bicycle, antenna, bed etc)
sentence: 这把椅子可以折叠，放在车里很方便。
pinyin: Zhè bǎ yǐzi kěyǐ zhédié, fàng zài chē lǐ hěn fāngbiàn.
english: This chair can be folded up, which is very convenient to put in the car.

sentence: 最近天气逐渐趋于稳定。
pinyin: Zuì jìn tiān qì zhú jiàn qū yú wěn dìng.
english: The weather has been gradually tending toward stability lately.

meaning: 1. drop in elevation; 2. (fig.) gap (in wages, expectations etc); 3. d
sentence: 理想和现实之间有很大的落差。
pinyin: Lǐxiǎng hé xiànshí zhījiān yǒu hěn dà de luòchà.
english: There is a huge gap between expectations and reality.

sentence: 他练习跳水已经有五年了。
pinyin: Tā liàn xí tiào shuǐ yǐ jīng yǒu wǔ nián le.
english: He has been practicing diving for five years.

meaning: to increase revenue; to increase income by (x amount); to levy (a surc
sentence: 农民通过种植新品种来增收。
pinyin: Nóng mín tōng guò zhòng zhí xīn pǐn zhǒng lái zēng shōu.
english: Farmers increase their income by growing new crop varieties.
